_comment: Canonical inbound command payload shapes published by g8ee to the cmd:{operator_id}:{operator_session_id} pub/sub channel. g8eo deserializes these from the channel. Each payload is the `data` field inside the pub/sub message. Consumers: g8ee (Python, publishes), g8eo (Go models/commands.go, consumes).
_comment.wire_format: g8ee publishes a JSON object with fields: event_type, payload (one of the schemas below), plus routing fields (operator_id, operator_session_id, case_id, investigation_id, web_session_id). g8eo reads event_type to select the correct payload deserializer.

command._description: Payload for event_type: g8e.v1.operator.command.requested. g8eo executes a shell command.

execution_id.description: Unique execution identifier for tracking and cancellation

justification.description: AI-provided justification for why this command is being run

sentinel_mode.description: Vault scrubbing mode for output storage. See status.json vault.mode.

timeout_seconds.description: Execution timeout override. Defaults to operator runtime_config value.

command_cancel._description: Payload for event_type: g8e.v1.operator.command.cancel.requested. g8eo cancels an in-flight execution.

execution_id.description: execution_id of the running command to cancel

file_edit._description: Payload for event_type: g8e.v1.operator.file.edit.requested. g8eo performs a file operation.

file_path.description: Absolute path to the target file on the operator host

sentinel_mode.description: Vault scrubbing mode. See status.json vault.mode.

old_content.description: Exact content to find and replace (replace operation)

insert_position.description: 1-indexed line number for insertion point (insert operation)

start_line.description: 1-indexed start line (delete or read range operation)

end_line.description: 1-indexed end line inclusive (delete or read range operation)

patch_content.description: Unified diff format patch content (patch operation)

create_if_missing.description: Create the file if it does not exist (write operation)

fs_list._description: Payload for event_type: g8e.v1.operator.filesystem.list.requested. g8eo lists directory contents.

path.description: Directory path to list. Defaults to current working directory.

max_depth.description: Recursion depth. 0 = current directory only. Max 3.

max_entries.description: Maximum number of entries to return. Max 500.

fs_read._description: Payload for event_type: g8e.v1.operator.filesystem.read.requested. g8eo reads a file and returns its content.

path.description: Absolute or relative path to the file to read

max_size.description: Maximum number of bytes to read. Defaults to 100 KiB.

fetch_logs._description: Payload for event_type: g8e.v1.operator.logs.fetch.requested. g8eo fetches stored execution output from its local vault.

execution_id.description: execution_id of the stored execution to fetch logs for

sentinel_mode.description: Vault scrubbing mode to use when reading. See status.json vault.mode.

fetch_history._description: Payload for event_type: g8e.v1.operator.history.fetch.requested. g8eo returns a list of past execution IDs.

fetch_file_history._description: Payload for event_type: g8e.v1.operator.file.history.fetch.requested. g8eo returns file edit history for a path.

file_path.description: Absolute path to the file to retrieve edit history for

fetch_file_diff._description: Payload for event_type: g8e.v1.operator.file.diff.fetch.requested. g8eo returns diff entries from the scrubbed vault.

diff_id.description: Specific diff entry ID to fetch

operator_session_id.description: Fetch all diffs for an operator session

limit.description: Maximum number of diff entries to return

restore_file._description: Payload for event_type: g8e.v1.operator.file.restore.requested. g8eo restores a file to a prior git commit.

file_path.description: Absolute path of the file to restore

commit_hash.description: Git commit hash to restore the file to

port_check._description: Payload for event_type: g8e.v1.operator.network.port.check.requested. g8eo checks whether a network port is reachable on a specified host.

execution_id.description: Unique execution identifier for tracking the result

host.description: Host to check (IP address or hostname). Defaults to 'localhost'.

protocol.description: Protocol to use for the check

shutdown._description: Payload for event_type: g8e.v1.operator.shutdown.requested. g8eo initiates a graceful shutdown.

reason.description: Human-readable reason for the shutdown request

heartbeat_request._description: Payload for event_type: g8e.v1.operator.heartbeat.requested. g8eo immediately sends a heartbeat.

audit_user_msg._description: Payload for event_type: g8e.v1.operator.audit.user.recorded. g8eo stores a user chat message in its local audit log.

audit_ai_msg._description: Payload for event_type: g8e.v1.operator.audit.ai.recorded. g8eo stores an AI response in its local audit log.

audit_direct_cmd._description: Payload for event_type: g8e.v1.operator.audit.direct.command.recorded. g8ee sends this when a user runs a command directly from the anchored terminal.

command.description: Command issued from the anchored terminal

audit_direct_exec_result._description: Payload for event_type: g8e.v1.operator.audit.direct.command.result.recorded. g8ee sends the Sentinel-scrubbed result of a direct terminal command.
